title: Crunchy Croatian Rest-Meat Sandwich
description: A nostalgic and peppery dish featuring crispy rest-meat, buns, and an iron teppan, suitable for a Whole30 diet.
instructions: Heat a non-stick iron teppan over medium heat.
Rub the teppan with coconut oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the buns for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Cook the rest-meat in a separate pan over medium heat for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy, breaking it up occasionally with a spatula.
Add the shredded cabbage to the rest-meat and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until wilted.
Sprinkle the caraway seeds over the rest-meat mixture and toss to combine.
Season with black pepper and salt to taste.
Assemble the sandwiches by placing the rest-meat mixture onto the grilled buns.
Top each sandwich with a sprinkle of fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
